description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay and SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=gitlab-ci variables. Define three stages: build, package, and deploy. In the build stage add a maven-build job that runs the maven:3-jdk-8 image, executes mvn package -B, and saves target/*.jar as artifacts. In the package stage add a docker-build job that runs docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/freundchen/spring-boot-and-react ., then docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, and finally docker push registry.gitlab.com/freundchen/spring-boot-and-react. In the deploy stage add a k8s-deploy job that uses the google/cloud-sdk image to write $GOOGLE_KEY to key.json, authenticate with gcloud, set the compute zone to europe-west3-b, set the project to spring-boot-and-react, enable client certificates, retrieve the cluster credentials, create a Docker registry secret using $REGISTRY_PASSWD, and apply deployment.yml with kubectl.
